raw_consumer_statement:
Hello American Express Agents, As uploaded is the court documents. This will be going to Court on the XX/XX/XXXX. I implore you to wait on the dispute until the Judge has made a decision on this matter. Ive provided ample if not a exceedingly large list of why these are fraudulent charges. I find it quite amazing that you are still holding out. To highlight the facts : We had a verbal agreement that I would be charged {$5000.00} for the operation, they took my personal belonging including my credit card. 
They would not give me a fit to fly letter unless I had the XXXX ( which after speaking to council was illegal ) They charged my credit card 3 times ( which is weird, with 3 very different signatures ) at the hospital without me knowing I had to have a second XXXX here in the US to fix the work they did in XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX, along with the supporting equipment where the crutches broke in the airport The largest point of Fraud is that they charged my Insurance Company for the XXXX and actually had it at a different cost then they charged my Amex. This is such a damning piece of information that I am not sure why they are not seeing the discrepancies and the fact they got additional money for free. 

The fact they can charge me 3 times without my consent, we had a verbal agreement, I had to have the XXXX re-done and the doctor even said they used things they shouldnt have and you are saying this isnt fraud. I dont know what is. 
I am not sure if you can provide counter evidence to each fact that I outlined or you are just saying. We dont think its fraud, therefore too bad. Regardless this will all be presented infront of a judge on XX/XX/XXXX at XXXX for judgement. 

Thanks, XXXX
